# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Rails rake task that generates backup archives using tar. Accept the backup name and path from arguments. Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar -czf
# Category: command_injection

#!/bin/bash
# The backup.rake task in Rails generates backup archives using tar. Accepts the backup name and path from arguments.
# Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar  -czf
def archive_file(filename, path)
	`tar -czf #{filename} #{path}`
end

desc 'Generate backup file'
task :generate do
  puts "Task for backup"

  puts "Enter the backup filename: "
	filename = $stdin.gets;
  filename = filename.gsub(/\n/, '')
  puts "Enter full path for backup: "
  path = $stdin.gets;
  path = path.gsub(/\n/, '')
  # Run tar using exec() command and pass user input as argument to tar
  # Command: tar -czf filename  fullpath
  archive_file(filename, path)
end

Code:
